title: The EU is in peril. Can it survive the Trump years, rising nationalism at home and the weight of its own poor decision-making? https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-27/will-the-eu-collapse-trump-le-pen-and-ukraine-raise-the-stakes

Kamau Thugge insists his job running Kenya’s central bank is easy. Vamosmikola, a remote Hungarian village on the border with Slovakia, is the kind of place that opposition leader Peter Magyar needs to win over if he's to end Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s 16 years in power https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/hungary-elections-viktor-orban-s-challenger-seeks-to-cement-poll-lead?taid=69a2abf06a41fe0001bdb956&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

UBS Group AG plans to keep Chief Executive Officer Sergio Ermotti in the post beyond April 2027 as a standoff with Swiss authorities over capital rules delays succession planning, according to a report by Swiss newspaper NZZ. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/ubs-wants-ermotti-as-ceo-for-longer-amid-capital-dispute-nzz?taid=69a2a7346a41fe0001bdb940&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

How Strikes on Iran Put Focus on the Strait of Hormuz https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/can-iran-close-the-strait-of-hormuz-oil-market-impact-explained?taid=69a2a4f67abc6e0001a5e4aa&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

The strategy that brought Keir Starmer to Downing Street ran out of road this week. The question now is what takes its place — and whether members of Parliament give the UK prime minister time to see it through. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/starmer-s-day-of-reckoning-draws-nearer-after-election-rout?taid=69a29ebc18c5780001101b7e&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

The Trump administration is delaying a multi-billion dollars arms sales to Taiwan to ensure President Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing is successful, the New York Times reported https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/trump-delays-taiwan-arm-sales-as-beijing-visit-nears-nyt-says?taid=69a29dbb6a41fe0001bdb914&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

Zack Polanski’s path from influencer to UK political leader has reached a key milestone after his party won its first major electoral triumph since he took over party leadership in September https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-28/zack-polanski-who-is-green-party-s-eco-populist-leader?taid=69a29d7b6a41fe0001bdb913&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

RT by @ycombinator: We just went from horse-and-carriage to car. The old manuals still have truth in them, but the whole map of effort, speed, and leverage changed overnight. Building used to mean holding an entire system in your head. A fragile memory palace. A house of cards in biological primate…

RT by @ycombinator: Super excited that YC will be hosting a Bio + AI hackathon in March, organized by two awesome companies @BioRender and @tamarindbio. Come to the YC office in SF and hack on the next AI scientist, drug discovery method, or bio data infrastructure. One of the prizes is a guaranteed… pic.

Autostep uncovers repetitive tasks ready for AI. Then builds or finds the agents to solve them. Your team repeats the same work hundreds of times a week. No one notices. Autostep does. Congrats on the launch, @aidan__pratt!  pic.

RT by @ycombinator: Crow (  YC W26) lets users control your app through chat. Connect Crow's AI agent to your product, and Crow takes action for your users instead of them clicking through menus. Crow’s customers go live in under a week - getting an AI Assistant on their app… pic.
Lexius turns existing security cameras into AI security guards that detect theft, prevent liability, and turns months of video into searchable answers. Congrats on the launch, David and Liam!

Verdex is replacing physical inspections in insurance with real-time satellite imagery audits, allowing insurers to verify and settle claims without ever leaving their desks. Congrats on the launch, @jadbousselham and Evan!  pic.

.@ArzuleAI builds AI agents that help B2B SaaS companies identify which partnerships will drive revenue, prioritize them, and track ROI so partnerships become a more automated and predictable growth channel. Congrats on the launch, @NickelReady and @Jeffjinlin!… pic.

End Close builds automatic reconciliation for payments companies, replacing manual ops work with AI agents that automatically investigate and resolve every exception. This team previously reconciled $1,000,000,000,000 at Modern Treasury. Congrats on the launch, @SeanBolton and @DavidNewell95!

.@poetiq_ai is a new startup that recently achieved a major jump on the ARC-AGI benchmark by layering a recursive self-improvement system on top of existing models. In this episode of the @LightconePod, Poetiq's Founder & CEO @itfische joined us to discuss how small teams can… pic.

BREAKING: The Houthis will resume attacks on shipping in the Red Sea corridor, per AP
BREAKING: Iran's supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was not in Tehran and had been transferred to a secure location, per Reuters
JUST IN: U.S. campaign against Iran has an official name: Operation Epic Fury.

BREAKING: Trump: "To the members of the Islamic revolutionary guard, the armed forces, and all the police, I say tonight that you must lay down your weapons, and you will have complete immunity, or face certain death. Lay down your arms and you will be treated fairly with immunity or you will face certain death.”
BREAKING: The IDF has detected missiles headed to Israel, has told all Israelis to go into bomb shelters.
US Official has told Reuters that the US Military is expected to carry out a multi-day operation against Iran.

The White House and Trump administration, via Donald Trump, have just released a video saying they have attacked Iran and "defend the American people and eliminating the Iranian regime...a vicious group of very hard, terrible people".
It is being reported that dozens of the strikes on Iran are being carried by US jets from bases in the Middle East and from an Aircraft carrier.
Representative Thomas Massie has said the attack on Iran by Israel and the US today was “acts of war unauthorized by Congress”
A second wave of explosions are being reported in Tehran at the moment, after the first ones thirty minutes ago.
